title: Packing the Bag: Where does it go?
learningGoal: The learner will accurately extract spatial prepositions (In, On, Under) from a fast-paced, native-speed dialogue, correctly mapping objects to their designated locations.
instructions: Listen to Amit and his sister packing for a trip. His sister is telling him exactly WHERE to put things. Pay close attention to 'In', 'On', and 'Under'! Try to picture where the items are going. Answer the 8 questions.

contentItems.text: Notice how the words are linked. 'In a bag' sounds like 'Innuh bag'.

listeningGoal: Accurately parse auditory cues to isolate rapid preposition-article linkages and map them to physical locations.
audioScenario: A sister dictating packing instructions to her brother before a trip.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: The shirts are on the bed. Put them in the bag.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: द शर्ट्स आर ऑन द बेड। पुट देम इन द बैग।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: कमीजें बिस्तर पर हैं। उन्हें थैले में रखो।
हो गया। मेरा कैमरा कहाँ है?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Your camera is in the box. The box is under the desk.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: योर कैमरा इज़ इन द बॉक्स। द बॉक्स इज़ अंडर द डेस्क।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: तुम्हारा कैमरा डिब्बे में है। डिब्बा मेज़ के नीचे है।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Okay, I have the camera. Do I put it in the bag?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ओके, आई हैव द कैमरा। डू आई पुट इट इन द बैग?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: ठीक है, मेरे पास कैमरा है। क्या मैं इसे थैले में रखूँ?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: No! Put the camera on the table. It is fragile.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: नो! पुट द कैमरा ऑन द टेबल। इट इज़ फ्रेजाएल।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: नहीं! कैमरे को मेज़ पर रखो। यह नाज़ुक है।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: The tickets are in my purse.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: द टिकट्स आर इन माई पर्स।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: It is on the chair in the living room.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: इट इज़ ऑन द चेयर इन द लिविंग रूम।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: यह लिविंग रूम में कुर्सी पर है।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Okay, I found it. The tickets are under your phone.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ओके, आई फाउंड इट। द टिकट्स आर अंडर योर फोन।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: ठीक है, मुझे मिल गया। टिकट तुम्हारे फोन के नीचे हैं।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Great! We are ready to go.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ग्रेट! वी आर रेडी टू गो।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: महान! हम जाने के लिए तैयार हैं।

audioTranscriptFull:
Sister: Amit, please pack the bag.
Amit: Okay. Where are the shirts?
Sister: The shirts are on the bed. Put them in the bag.
Amit: Done. Where is my camera?
Sister: Your camera is in the box. The box is under the desk.
Amit: Okay, I have the camera. Do I put it in the bag?
Sister: No! Put the camera on the table. It is fragile.
Amit: Where are the tickets?
Sister: The tickets are in my purse.
Amit: Where is your purse?
Sister: It is on the chair in the living room.
Amit: Okay, I found it. The tickets are under your phone.
Sister: Great! We are ready to go.

questionSet.questionText: Where were the shirts initially located before packing?
What does Amit's sister tell him to do with the shirts?
Where is the camera initially located?
Where does the sister tell Amit to put the camera?
What exactly was UNDER the phone?
True or False: The camera ultimately went INSIDE the bag.

scoringRules.partialCreditRules: No partial credit for Q2, Q4, Q5. The preposition is binary.

feedbackRules.onPass: Astounding! You were able to track all the moving pieces perfectly, correctly mapping the prepositional audio cues to their visual locations.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep trying! Ensure you playback the audio on Slow mode. Listen specifically for 'In' versus 'On'. Did she say ON the bag, or IN the bag?
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good ear! You caught most of the locations. But remember: the camera did NOT go in the bag. She said 'Put it ON the table'!

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Sister: Amit, please pack the bag... (matches full transcript)

hintText: When the sister says 'In the box', try to visualize the camera dropping down into a box. When she says 'On the table', visualize it sitting flat on top.
commonMistakes: Thinking Amit put the camera in the bag.
Thinking the Box was IN the desk instead of UNDER.
